name: count_games
description: Count all games in the library.

name: list_games
description: List games. game_type = all|local|online|iscustom; sort_option = addtime|datetime|lastplayed|bgmrank|vndbrank|namesort; sort_order = asc|desc. All optional (defaults: all/addtime/desc).

name: get_game
description: Get one game (full row incl. embedded metadata) by id.

name: list_collections
description: List root collections.

name: get_games_in_collection
description: List the game ids in a collection.

name: get_game_collection_ids
description: List the collection ids a game belongs to.

name: get_game_statistics
description: Get aggregate playtime statistics for a game.

name: get_all_game_statistics
description: Get aggregate statistics for all games.

name: get_game_sessions
description: List play sessions for a game (newest first). limit default 50, offset default 0.

name: add_game
description: Add a game. id_type is required (e.g. "custom", "bgm", "vndb"). Supply metadata via custom_data {name,developer,summary,tags,aliases,nsfw,...} and/or bgm_data/vndb_data/ymgal_data/kun_data, plus optional localpath/savepath/date.

name: update_game
description: Update a game's fields. `updates` is a partial games object (e.g. {localpath, date, custom_data:{...}}); omitted fields are left unchanged.

name: create_collection
description: Create a collection (group/category). parent_id optional (nest under a parent); sort_order default 0.

name: update_collection
description: Update a collection (rename / reparent / reorder / set icon). Omitted fields unchanged.

name: add_games_to_collections
description: Add multiple games to multiple collections (many-to-many).

name: set_game_collections
description: Replace the full set of collections a single game belongs to.

name: remove_games_from_collection
description: Remove games from one collection (does not delete the games).

name: record_session
description: Record a play session. Times are unix seconds; duration in seconds; date is YYYY-MM-DD.

name: init_game_statistics
description: Create an empty statistics row for a game if none exists.

name: delete_game
description: Delete a game by id. Requires human approval.

name: delete_games_batch
description: Delete multiple games by id. Requires human approval.

name: delete_collection
description: Delete a collection by id (games are not deleted). Requires human approval.

name: delete_game_session
description: Delete a single play-session record. Requires human approval.

name: delete_game_statistics
description: Delete a game's statistics row. Requires human approval.
